Product Update February 2026
What's New

A faster, smarter dashboard — built from your feedback.

Over the past month, we shipped three features requested by more than 60% of our customers. Below is a brief walkthrough — and we would genuinely value your reaction at the end.

Visual Overview

Fig. 2 — Caption for screenshot 2.

Fig. 3 — Caption for screenshot 3.

  • 01 Dashboard load time reduced by 60% — faster data, less waiting.
  • 02 NPS trend chart now breaks down scores by customer cohort and campaign.
  • 03 One-click CSV export for any filtered feedback view.
